title: rsp.len() > i32::MAX returns wrong error variant
description: In do_transact (wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs), c_int::try_from(rsp.len()) failure returns Error::ResponseBufferTooSmall. But a buffer larger than i32::MAX is not 'too small' — it is too large to express. The cmd_sz case was fixed in this diff (now returns CommandTooLarge) but the rsp_buf_sz case was not fixed, creating an inconsistency and a misleading error message. Trigger: caller passes a response buffer larger than 2GB.
